underlying_goal: Fix drill-down stat cards in the signal analysis UI, then investigate and plan a fix for broken histogram data caused by sampling limits, culminating in a full normalization/histogram overhaul planned via Trello cards
friction_detail: Claude's initial stat card implementation showed wrong data (pair-total vs bin-scoped counts), and Claude gave incorrect/overcomplicated answers about signal normalization before being corrected by the user multiple times.
brief_summary: User wanted drill-down stat cards fixed, discovered histogram data was broken due to sampling caps, designed a full signal normalization plan via Trello cards — mostly achieved after several rounds of correction.
